text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp begins today, and Winning Ticket
seems more than excited.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna practice hard all summer long! Arima
Kinen, here I come!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is the start of Winning Ticket's final summer
camp.
